readonly.description: Non-interactive baseline for launch context, storage, login, and shell-local readonly APIs.
notes: Suitable for cold-start DevTools and real-device smoke when no network or modal UI should appear.

network.description: Validates request and websocket APIs with caller-provided endpoints.
notes: Prefer a dedicated probe endpoint instead of a game backend route.

subpackage.description: Validates deferred pack loading through the shared subpackage contract.
notes: Requires a real subpackage name owned by the target repo.

interactive.description: Validates UI-bearing APIs such as share, rewarded ad, and modal.
notes: Requires a runtime where UI interaction is allowed.
Rewarded ad will skip when the ad unit id is not configured.

readonly.description: Non-interactive baseline for launch context, login, storage, and launcher runtime APIs.
notes: Suitable for initial Developer Tools and real-device bring-up without disruptive UI.

network.description: Validates request and websocket APIs with caller-provided endpoints.
notes: Keep endpoints probe-specific so failures are easy to classify.

subpackage_and_scene.description: Validates subpackage loading and scene reporting through the shared backend contract.
notes: Requires a real subpackage name and a numeric scene id accepted by the host runtime.

interactive.description: Validates UI-bearing APIs such as share, rewarded ad, interstitial, and keyboard.
notes: Requires a runtime where UI interaction is allowed.
Ad calls will skip when the configured unit ids are absent.
